<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Click all 6 remaining green blocks
# Top row blocks (rows 1-5): centers at rows 3, cols 15, 21, 27
# Middle row blocks (rows 13-17): centers at rows 15, cols 39, 45, 51
actions = [
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 3, 'col': 15},   # Top-left green
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 3, 'col': 21},   # Top-middle green
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 3, 'col': 27},   # Top-right green
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 15, 'col': 39},  # Middle-left green
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 15, 'col': 45},  # Middle-middle green
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 15, 'col': 51},  # Middle-right green
]
result = action(actions)
print(f"Result: {result}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
green_blocks = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"Green blocks remaining: {len(green_blocks)}")
print(f"Level completed: {result.get('level_completed')}")
print(f"Done: {result.get('done')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
